items.title: Never accepted total Prohibition, says MP
Madras High Court dismisses plea for CBI probe into the alleged bid to bribe TVK MLA
items.summary: A Bench of Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan has said a court of law will not transfer a statutory investigation from one agency to another solely on the basis of newspaper headlines or viral video/audio clips circulating on digital platforms regarding the alleged ‘horse trading’ complaints

items.title: West Asia war puts banana growers on a slippery ground
